Priority tasks for this sprint:

🔴 URGENT: Fix the checkout bug - customers can't complete purchases
🟡 IMPORTANT: Update the privacy policy for GDPR compliance (deadline: March 1st)
🟡 IMPORTANT: Set up monitoring alerts for the new microservices
🟢 NICE TO HAVE: Refactor the legacy authentication module
🟢 NICE TO HAVE: Add dark mode to the settings page
